description_long: This chaise features a long, segmented design with three distinct padded sections upholstered in light blue fabric adorned with a subtle dotted pattern. The backrest is slightly reclined and elevated, providing ergonomic support, while the seat and leg sections extend horizontally for full-body lounging. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood, visible along the sides and supporting the structure with sturdy, angular legs. The upholstery appears tufted, with small, regularly spaced buttons adding texture and visual interest. The chaise lacks armrests, emphasizing an open, minimalist silhouette suitable for outdoor or park settings. Its overall appearance is inviting and comfortable, blending modern and classic elements.
description: A light blue, tufted chaise with a segmented, padded design and a sturdy wooden frame, ideal for lounging. The chaise features a reclined backrest, no armrests, and a subtle dotted upholstery pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full length of the chaise, highlighting the three padded sections and the absence of armrests.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the reclined backrest, segmented cushions, and the angular wooden support structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wooden frame and support legs, with the backrest's thickness and structure visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizes the chaise's length, segmented cushions, and the open, armless design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is moderately high, slightly reclined, and features a gently curved, rectangular shape. It is upholstered in tufted light blue fabric with small, evenly spaced buttons, adding a subtle decorative touch.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, angular, and made of light-colored wood, providing sturdy support and a clean, modern look. There are no visible decorative elements on the legs.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is light blue with a subtle dotted pattern and features tufting with small, regularly spaced buttons, giving the surface a quilted appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are three attached, padded cushion sections: one for the backrest, one for the seat, and one for the leg rest. The cushions are seamlessly connected and evenly distributed along the length of the chaise.
